name: Submergence Evasion
descriptionTemplate: Submarine units under command receive X% less damage and have a 50% chance to dodge when attacked by airstrike or missile. Submarine recover 5% of its maximum HP each turn.

progression.renderedDesc: Submarine units under command receive 7% less damage and have a 50% chance to dodge when attacked by airstrike or missile. Submarine recover 5% of its maximum HP each turn.
